result:
The data cleaning task has been completed successfully. The R script was executed and produced the output file data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 16,111 rows and exactly 5 variables as required: NSID, educma, educpa, educdtlma, and educdtlpa.

The script performed the following operations:
1. Loaded three wave datasets (wave 1, 2, and 4) from data/input/ using read_delim with tab delimiter
2. Selected only NSID and parental education variables (W1hiqualmum, W1hiqualdad, W2hiqualmum, W2hiqualdad, w4hiqualmum, w4hiqualdad)
3. Merged all waves using full_join by NSID
4. Harmonized missing value codes across waves to standard scheme (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know, -3=Not asked, -2=Schedule not applicable, -1=Item not applicable)
5. Created consolidated detailed variables (educdtlma, educdtlpa) by prioritizing valid positive responses (1-20) across waves
6. Derived collapsed variables (educma, educpa) mapping 20 detailed categories to 5 NVQ levels (0=NVQ 4-5, 1=NVQ 1-3, 2=None/entry, 3=Other, 4=No qualifications)
7. Applied variable labels using the labelled package
8. Wrote the final dataset to data/output/cleaned_data.csv
